title: ornithopus creticus
intro: Ornithopus creticus, also known as cretan bird's foot, is a perennial herb in the legume family, characterized by its unique, bird's foot-shaped flower clusters. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Ornithopus creticus is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its dried flowers can also be used in herbal remedies.
